untranslatable_reason: Signal requires detection of anchoring bias, news events, and 'drift magnitude from rational value' — these behavioral/fundamental concepts cannot be expressed using only technical price/volume indicators. The 'news' event detection and 'rational valuation gap' estimation are not available in the allowed indicator set. ATR approximates drift magnitude but does not capture the semantic intent of anchoring-driven underreaction to news.
translation_notes: Used ADX(14) > 20 for trend confirmation as specified. Approximated drift detection via ATR > 1.0 stddev equivalent. Used vol_ratio_20 < 0.5 for volume reversal exit. Position held max 80 bars as specified. Direction marked CONTEXT_DEPENDENT to allow both long and short entries based on drift direction.
